activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate an understanding of the concept of Computer Science
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept of Computer Science (meaning, importance, application)
suggested_methods: Brainstorming and Think-Ink-Pair Share (TIPS): Through brainstorming and Think-Ink-Pair Share (TIPS) guide students to describe the concept of Computer Science
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently describe the concept of Computer Science field
suggested_resources: Handouts with contents of Computer Science concepts

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate an understanding of the concept of Computer Science
activities.learning_activity: (b) Describe fields related to Computer Science (IT, ICT, IS, Computer Engineering)
suggested_methods: Question and answer, guest speaker; and/or case study: Use question and answer, guest speaker; and case study to guide students to describe fields related to Computer Science
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently describe fields related to Computer Science

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of computer systems
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe computer systems (Meaning, types, functions, and significance)
suggested_methods: Questions and answers: Through questions and answers guide students to describe computer system
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly describe computer systems

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of computer systems
activities.learning_activity: (b) Describe computer hardware (meaning, components, functions, computer generation)
suggested_methods: Small groups: Guide students in small groups to describe computer hardware.
Demonstration: Use demonstration to show different components of computer hardware
practical work: Guide students through practical work to connect different parts of computer system
activities.assessment_criteria: Realise parts of computer hardware and their functions

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of computer systems
activities.learning_activity: (c) Describe computer software (meaning, types, functions)
suggested_methods: TIPS and Demonstration: Using TIPS and demonstration to guide students to describe computer software
activities.assessment_criteria: Realise types of computer software and their functions

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of computer systems
activities.learning_activity: (d) Describe and observe principles of computer system handling (safety measures, management, cleanliness, data backup and utilities)
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Though group discussion students to describe principles of computer handling.
Demonstration: Teacher to demonstrate on how to perform computer handling technique
Practical work: Students through practical work to practice on computer handling
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly observe principles of handling the computer system

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.3 Demonstrate mastery of maintenance and troubleshooting of computer system
activities.learning_activity: (a) Install simple computer software
suggested_methods: Demonstration
Practical Work: Through demonstration guide students to install simple software and students to do Practical work on installation of software
activities.assessment_criteria: Can install computer software

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.3 Demonstrate mastery of maintenance and troubleshooting of computer system
activities.learning_activity: (b) Organise computer files in different operating systems (windows, Linux, etc)
suggested_methods: Demonstration
Practical Work: Through demonstration guide students to organise computer files and students to do practical work to organise computer files
activities.assessment_criteria: Can use operating systems to organise computer files
suggested_resources: simulated steps videos and smart phone

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles in problem solving
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the steps in solving a problem using computers (concept of problem solving, steps of problem solving, concept of algorithms)
suggested_methods: Brainstorming: Through brainstorming guide students to describe the steps of solving a problem using computer
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly describe the steps of solving a problem using computer
suggested_resources: hand outs of of the basic principles in problem solving and tablets

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles in problem solving
activities.learning_activity: (b) Demonstrate an understanding of basic principle of algorithms
suggested_methods: Brainstorming and Demonstration: Through brainstorming and demonstration guide students to describe the concept of an algorithm
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly explain how the algorithm can be used to address problems

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles in problem solving
activities.learning_activity: (c) Design and present a single algorithm using flow charts and pseudocode
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Guide students through demonstration on how to present algorithms using flow charts and pseudocode
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently can apply algorithms to present new ways to address problems

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept of internet and cyber security (ethics, security, and privacy)
suggested_methods: Group discussion and Case study: Through group discussion and case study guide students to describe the concept of cyber security
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly explain the concept of cyber security

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
activities.learning_activity: (b) Use Internet services (searching information, www, electronic mail)
suggested_methods: Practical work: Through practical work guide students to use Internet service
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently can use Internet service

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
activities.learning_activity: (c) Understand cyber security threats and related counter measures
suggested_methods: TIPS: Through TIPS guide students to elaborate security threats and related counter measures
Case Study: Use case study for example to demonstrate threats and counter measures
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly Elaborate security threats and related measures

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
activities.learning_activity: (d) Evaluate ethical issues, related principles, and practices of cyber security
suggested_methods: Case study: Using case study guide students to evaluate ethical issues
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly evaluates issues and related policies governing ethics, security and privacy maintenance and troubleshooting of computer system

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate mastery of the Internet, and basics of cyber security
activities.learning_activity: (e) Apply basic cyber security measures (passwords, safe browsing, netiquette)
suggested_methods: Case study: Using case studies to guide students to apply basic cyber security measures.
Practical work: Students to do practical work to set password
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently basic cyber security measures

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.)
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe concept of programming language (categories, paradigm, generic structures)
suggested_methods: TIPS, question and answer, and group discussion: Through TIPS, question and answer, and group discussion guide students to describe computer programming language
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly explain the concept of programming language
suggested_resources: Computer installed with appropriate programming tools

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.)
activities.learning_activity: (b) Describe programming tools (compiler/interpreter, text editor, IDE, Debugger)
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Through group discussion guide students to describe programming tools
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly can describe programming tools

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.)
activities.learning_activity: (c) Install and configure the selected programming language (compiler/interpreter, text editor, IDE, Debugger)
suggested_methods: Demonstration and Practical work: Through demonstration and practical work teacher to guide students to install and configure the selected programming language tools
activities.assessment_criteria: Mastering the environment of the selected program Can install and configure programming tools

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.)
activities.learning_activity: (d) Use programming tools of selected programming language to write a program (compile/run and debug a simple program)
suggested_methods: Practical work: Through practical work teacher to guide student to use program tools of selected programming language to write a simple program
activities.assessment_criteria: Mastering the of use programming tools of selected programming language

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.)
activities.learning_activity: (e) Use variables, constants, and data types of a selected programming language in a program (operators and expressions)
suggested_methods: Practical work: Through practical work teacher to guide students to use variables and data types of a selected programming language
activities.assessment_criteria: Can use variable and data type in programming language

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.)
activities.learning_activity: (f) Use syntax and constructs of the selected programming language to write programs branching
suggested_methods: Practical work: Through practical work teacher to guide students to write a program employing branching
activities.assessment_criteria: Can use syntax and various constructs to write programs

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.)
activities.learning_activity: (g) Debugging computer programs
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Guide students through demonstration to debug a program
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently debug the program

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.3 Demonstrate an understanding of the basic principles of computer architecture
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept of data representation (digital data, number systems, data type, character coding (UNICODE and ASCII)
suggested_methods: Question-and-answer
TIPS
small group discussion
activities.assessment_criteria: Explicitly explain the concept of digital data representation

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.3 Demonstrate an understanding of the basic principles of computer architecture
activities.learning_activity: (b) Represent numbers in different number systems (binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal)
suggested_methods: Demonstration
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently represent numbers in different number systems

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.3 Demonstrate an understanding of the basic principles of computer architecture
activities.learning_activity: (c) Convert numbers from one system to another (binary, decimal, and hexadecimal)
suggested_methods: Demonstration
activities.assessment_criteria: Competently convert numbers from one system to another

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.3 Demonstrate an understanding of the basic principles of computer architecture
activities.learning_activity: (d) Perform arithmetic operations (addition and subtraction) using binary numbers
suggested_methods: Demonstration
activities.assessment_criteria: Capability to perform arithmetic operations

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming
activities.learning_activity: (a) Use the syntax and constructs of selected programming language to write program (using an appropriate structured programming language such as C, python, etc.) (iteration, functions, array, and string)
suggested_methods: Demonstration
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently use iteration and functions in a program
suggested_resources: Computer installed with appropriate programming tools

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming
activities.learning_activity: (b) Use scope of variable in a program
suggested_methods: Demonstration
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently describe and use the concept of scope of variable

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming
activities.learning_activity: (c) Text and Debug computer program that employs iteration, array, string, branching and functions
suggested_methods: Demonstration
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently debug computer program that employs iteration and functions branching and functions

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate an understanding of basic principles of computer programming
activities.learning_activity: (d) Appraise the utility of the developed program
suggested_methods: Questions and answer
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly evaluate the efficacy of the developed application

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.4 Demonstrate an understanding of the basics of computer networks
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept of computer network) (meaning, mode, media, components, etc.)
suggested_methods: Demonstration
activities.assessment_criteria: Can clarify the concept computer network

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.4 Demonstrate an understanding of the basics of computer networks
activities.learning_activity: (b) Design a simple computer network involving a typical topology
suggested_methods: Demonstration
activities.assessment_criteria: Can design a simple computer network of a given topology

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.4 Demonstrate an understanding of the basics of computer networks
activities.learning_activity: (c) Create a computer network involving typical topology
suggested_methods: Demonstration
Practical work
activities.assessment_criteria: Confidently can use topology, data transmission mode and media to set computer network

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of data management
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate the mastery of basic principles of databases and database management systems
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept of data and information
suggested_methods: Brainstorming
activities.assessment_criteria: Cleary describe the concepts of data and information

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of data management
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate the mastery of basic principles of databases and database management systems
activities.learning_activity: (b) Manage simple data (create, store, retrieve, check data quality)
suggested_methods: TIPS
activities.assessment_criteria: Successfully manage simple data

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of data management
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate the mastery of basic principles of databases and database management systems
activities.learning_activity: (c) Describe the concept of database and database management system
suggested_methods: Brainstorming
activities.assessment_criteria: Explicitly elaborate the concept of database and database management system

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of data management

activities.learning_activity: (d) Design a database
suggested_methods: Demonstration
Practical work

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of data management
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate the mastery of basic principles of databases and database management systems
activities.learning_activity: (e) Create a database using selected software (e.g., MS – Access)
suggested_methods: Practical work
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly identify steps of designing and developing a database and step by step create a database

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate mastery of systems administration
activities.learning_activity: (a) Maintain computer systems – desktop, laptop, tablets, mobile (create, delete/ disable user account, create, modify, and reset password, user support, peripherals)
suggested_methods: TIPS: Through TIPS guide students to explain the roles of system administrator.
Practical work: Through practical work students to maintain a computer system
activities.assessment_criteria: confidently maintain the computer system

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate mastery of systems administration
activities.learning_activity: (b) Apply troubleshooting tools and techniques
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Through demonstration guide student to apply troubleshooting and maintenance tools
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly identify the roles of system administrator and responsibly troubleshoot a system

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate mastery of systems administration
activities.learning_activity: (c) Use selected OS to Perform system administration tasks
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Through demonstration guide student to use selected OS to perform system administration duty
activities.assessment_criteria: Responsibly administer and maintain a system

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.5 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of web development (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript)
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the background of HTML and selected programming languages (CSS, JavaScript)
suggested_methods: Brainstorming or TIPS: Guide student through brainstorming or TIPS to describe the background of HTML and selected programming languages
activities.assessment_criteria: Clearly explain the background of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
suggested_resources: Computer installed with appropriate programming tools

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.5 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of web development (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript)
activities.learning_activity: (b) Install and configure the CSS and JavaScript interpreter (e.g., a web browser)
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Guide student through demonstration to install and configure the CSS and JavaScript interpreter
activities.assessment_criteria: Mastery the installation and configuration of CSS and JavaScript interpreter

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.5 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of web development (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript)
activities.learning_activity: (c) Create webpages using HTML and CSS, JavaScript
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Guide students through demonstration to create webpages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
activities.assessment_criteria: Successfully create static webpage using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.5 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of web development (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript)
activities.learning_activity: (d) Publish website
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Guide student through demonstration to publish a website
activities.assessment_criteria: Successfully publish the website

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.5 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of web development (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript)
activities.learning_activity: (e) Appraise the published website
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Through questions and answer to guide student to appraise the published website
activities.assessment_criteria: Can point out the use of developed website

activities.specific_competence: 2.6 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of mobile App
activities.learning_activity: (a) Create mobile App using the syntax of the selected program
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Guide student through demonstration to create mobile app using the syntax of the selected program
activities.assessment_criteria: Can read, write, test, and modify JavaScript languages upon creating a mobile App
suggested_resources: Computer installed with appropriate programming tools for mobole Apps

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.6 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of mobile App
activities.learning_activity: (b) Publish Mobile Apps
suggested_methods: Demonstration: Guide students through demonstration to publish Mobile Apps
activities.assessment_criteria: Can publish a mobile App

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
activities.specific_competence: 2.6 Demonstrate mastery of basic principles of mobile App
activities.learning_activity: (c) Appraise the efficacy of the published Mobile Apps
suggested_methods: Questions and answer: Through questions and answer to guide students to appraise the efficacy of the published Mobile Apps
activities.assessment_criteria: Can point out the use of developed mobile App

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of data management
activities.specific_competence: 3.2 Demonstrate the mastery of the basic principles of data analysis
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe principles of data analysis (data collection, pre-processing, processing, visualization, interpretation)
suggested_methods: Questions and answer: Through question and answer to guide students to describe principles of data analysis
activities.assessment_criteria: Can point out the principles of data analysis
suggested_resources: Computer installed with data analysis tools

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of data management
activities.specific_competence: 3.2 Demonstrate the mastery of the basic principles of data analysis
activities.learning_activity: (b) Analysis simple data using selected tools (e.g., SPSS, Excel, etc.)
suggested_methods: Practical work: Through practical work teacher to guide students to analysis simple data using selected tools
